allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://api.github.com/search/repositories?q=turkiye+il+ilce+json&per_page=10"; \(\($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).items\) | Select-Object full_name, description | Format-List)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://api.github.com/repos/berkaycatak/turkiye_il_ilce_json/contents/"; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Select-Object name, size, download_url | Format-List)
